calendar.matters:
Notie Of Prove-Up Hearing In Support Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-20-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Timothy J. Tomlin, Esq., appearing for Cross-Complainant WESTERN SURETY COMPANY, a South Dakota corporation.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted Cross-Defendant DENNIS BARSAM, an individual, and Cross-Defendant ENERGY STORE OF CALIFONRIA, INC., a California Corporation.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Cross-Complainant and against Defaulted Cross-defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $7,500.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $4,349.00
Costs: $876.30
Total Judgment in the amount of $12,725.30
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-06-2014 Dismissal - No Appearance

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-22-2014 Set For Trial On Oct-06-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
